rationale: The residence homestead exemption amount is governed by Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b, not §1. Section 1 permits exemptions 'as required or permitted by this Constitution' and does not set a dollar cap on homestead exemptions. No conflict arises.
quote: unless exempt as required or permitted by this Constitution
_note: The rule text is art. VIII, §1, which addresses equality/uniformity and general exemption authority. The residence homestead exemption dollar amount is established under art. VIII, §1-b (referenced in subsection (i) but not included in the provided text). No conflict with §1.
